# Awesome Codex Guide

OpenAI Codex guide for Chinese developers, with resource metadata for agents.

## Use This For

- Learning OpenAI Codex and Codex CLI.
- Writing `AGENTS.md`.
- Understanding Codex permissions, sandboxing, MCP, skills, plugins, and subagents.
- Troubleshooting authentication, sandbox, setup, and configuration errors.
- Finding official and community Codex resources with trust labels and risk scores.

## Entry Points

- Main README: ./README.md
- English README: ./README.en.md
- Getting started: ./docs/getting-started/README.zh-CN.md
- Codex CLI: ./docs/codex-cli/README.zh-CN.md
- AGENTS.md: ./docs/agents-md/README.zh-CN.md
- Permissions and security: ./docs/permissions-security/README.zh-CN.md
- Troubleshooting: ./docs/troubleshooting/common-errors.zh-CN.md
- Resource metadata: ./metadata/resources.json
- Agent index: ./agent-index.json

## Safety

Do not recommend resources involving shared API keys, authentication bypasses, closed one-click scripts, or unclear permissions. Treat MCP, plugins, token handling, local file access, and network-enabled automation as security-sensitive.
